parent_epic_id.description: The ID of the epic this task belongs to. Can be an existing UUID or a temp_id from this proposal.

insert_after_task_id.description: Optional. The ID of the task after which this one should be inserted. If omitted, it will be placed first in the epic. Can be an existing UUID or a temp_id from this proposal.

items.description: The ID of a component this task is associated with. Can be an existing UUID or a temp_id from this proposal.

implements_contract_id.description: The ID of the contract this task implements. Can be an existing UUID or a temp_id from this proposal.

source_task_id.description: The ID of the task that produces this input. Can be an existing UUID or a temp_id from this proposal.
